title: Add nvm_failed: label and OSCORE_ERR_NVM_FAILED return in oscore_protect_request
description: Implement dedicated nvm_failed label after cleanup_protect_request or integrate with it. Set ret = OSCORE_ERR_NVM_FAILED; ensure sensitive data wipe happens before return. Reference oscore.c and security requirements for nonce uniqueness.
close_reason: Implemented dedicated nvm_failed label and OSCORE_ERR_NVM_FAILED handling with wipe in oscore_protect_request per security requirements for nonce uniqueness. Tests verified via existing nvm_protect_request_failure.
